letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice nimbuspay-202607

To the Billing Department, NimbusPay:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice nimbuspay-202607, covering the
billing period 2026-07-01 through 2026-07-31.

Per the governing clause (MSA §5.2):

    "In addition to per-employee fees, Customer shall pay a platform base fee of $300.00 per month."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $8,800.00.
The invoice as billed totals $8,850.00, a discrepancy of $50.00.

Calculation:
  - Flat fee: expected 300.00, billed 350.00 (overcharge of 50.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $50.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: In addition to per-employee fees, Customer shall pay a platform base fee of $300.00 per month.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 50.00.
